name: entitledto — LA bespoke
description: LA-customisable version with auto-enrolment messaging. Calculator URL points to the LA-specific entitledto subdomain.

body.hero_subtitle: Important news for parents and carers
body.intro_html: From September 2026, every child whose family receives Universal Credit can get free school meals.
body.cta_primary_title: The government are expanding free school meals and getting everyone to register annually.
body.cta_primary_body_html: Apply before the Autumn term starts so your child doesn't miss out.
body.box1_title: If your child currently gets free school meals
body.box1_body_html: From the 2026/27 school year, eligibility will be checked every year. In some areas your local authority will auto-enrol your child — otherwise make sure you claim again so your child keeps their free meals.
body.box2_title: If you receive Universal Credit but haven't claimed before
body.box2_body_html: Your child is now eligible. Claim from 1 June for the start of September.
body.how_to_steps_html:
• Download the form from your school's website
  • Or pick up a paper copy from the school office
body.cta_secondary_body_html: You may still be entitled. Use the free, independent entitledto calculator to check Universal Credit, free school meals, and 30+ other benefits in under 10 minutes.
body.contact_website: Used by Local Authorities, Housing Associations and Citizens Advice
body.attribution_html: Published by entitledto.co.uk · Free to copy, adapt and share · CC BY 4.0

facts.eligibility_basis: Receipt of Universal Credit (England, from September 2026)
facts.auto_enrolment_status: Some LAs auto-enrol; others require parents to claim each year.
facts.claim_window_purpose: To be ready for the start of September.
